summary: A rebroadcast NBC Bay Area investigative news package about a deportation-fighting organizer/tattoo artist in California who, after a judge granted a temporary reprieve from ICE custody, was arrested for a string of new crimes including an attempted carjacking with a 3-year-old inside. It is a standard reporter-narrated news segment with field B-roll, an interview, and a quote card, not produced entertainment content.
notable_text: NBC Bay Area chyron: 'ORGANIZER FIGHTING DEPORTATION ACCUSED OF NEW CRIMES'; reporter 'JAXON VAN DERBEKEN INVESTIGATIVE REPORTER'; quote card 'Initially called in as a medical for a male breathing heavily, but now possibly a fentanyl overdose...'
